info.description: 志愿报考分析平台后端 API
info.title: Admission API

post.description: 扫描 recommendation_precomputed_scores 中缺失或过期（默认 90 天）的 (university × major) 行，逐个调用评估器（默认 LLM）填充五维基准分。可指定批量大小。
post.summary: 刷新推荐打分缓存（管理员）

get.description: 获取用户总数、会员等级分布和账号状态等运营数据
分页获取所有用户信息，支持按 email、username、role、status 过滤
获取指定用户的完整信息，用于前端编辑表单回填

post.description: 禁用指定用户，清除其所有 refresh token
解除对指定用户的禁用状态

put.description: 管理员为指定用户重置密码，重置后用户需重新登录

get.description: Returns school-major admission lines with university, admission group, local school major, score, rank, and plan fields. If admission_year is omitted, the latest available admission year is used for the selected region and subject category.

parameters.description: CHSI tag keyword, matching category/class/major code or name
parameters.name: tag_query

get.description: Aggregates admission lines by a dimension (province, city, subject_category, university, group). Supports metrics: count, avg_min_score, avg_min_rank, avg_tuition, is_985_count, is_211_count, is_double_first_class_count.

parameters.description: Dimension to group by: province, city, subject_category, university, group
parameters.name: group_by

parameters.description: Comma-separated metrics: count, avg_min_score, avg_min_rank, avg_tuition, is_985_count, is_211_count, is_double_first_class_count
parameters.name: metrics

get.description: Returns code-name values used by admission filters and imports.
Returns the latest available CHSI standard major catalog year.

post.description: 基于学生省份、选科、分数、位次、单科成绩、家庭资源、个人画像、地域偏好、专业偏好、职业规划，输出冲/稳/保三档志愿表，并对每个志愿给出综合评分与推荐理由。

get.description: Returns CHSI standard majors. If catalog_year is omitted, the latest catalog year is used.
Returns university identities enriched with latest profile information. Filters can narrow the result by region, school category, ownership type, education level, and university-tier flags.
Returns a university yearly profile. If profile_year is omitted, the latest profile is used.
Returns volunteer plans from plans.json.
Returns a detailed volunteer plan with user details, statistics, and rich group/major info.

post.description: Streams AI responses via SSE. Send messages array; receive text_delta / tool_call_start / tool_call_end / widget / done events.

get.description: Returns the same major across multiple universities for comparison.
Returns all admission groups for a university in a given year with aggregated metrics.
Returns per-major metrics for a university admission group.
Returns multi-year admission data for a university, optionally filtered by group and major.

post.description: 使用邮箱和密码登录，获取 Access Token 和 Refresh Token
用 Refresh Token 换取新的双 Token
使用邮箱和密码注册新账户

get.description: Lists active conversations, optionally filtered by user_id.

post.description: Creates a new AI conversation. If user_id is omitted, the conversation is anonymous.

get.description: Returns a conversation and its messages.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a conversation by marking it as deleted.

post.description: Sends a message in a conversation context. Persists messages and streams AI response via SSE.
Appends a user message to an existing conversation.
Discards the most recent assistant turn (if any) and re-runs the agent on the resulting history. SSE stream identical to ChatWithConversation.
Deletes messages at or after the specified message_id (inclusive by default). Used by the frontend "edit / regenerate" flows. Non-owners receive 404 to avoid leaking conversation existence.

get.description: Generates 2-4 follow-up question chips for a conversation. Cached in Redis keyed by (conversation_id, last_message_id).
返回当前登录用户的个人信息

put.description: 当前登录用户通过旧密码校验后修改自己的密码

post.description: 当前登录用户向指定手机号发送验证码，用于绑定手机号
当前登录用户校验验证码并完成手机号绑定

get.description: 返回当前用户的 premium 会员状态和有效期
返回当前可购买的 premium 月卡、季卡、年卡套餐

parameters.description: 非开发环境下必填的内部 mock 回调密钥
parameters.name: X-Mock-Callback-Secret

get.summary: 查询我的支付订单详情

post.summary: 主动检测订单支付状态
支付宝支付（电脑网站支付）

get.description: 检查服务及数据库连接状态

majorDistribution.description: e.g., { '计算机科学与技术': 10, '软件工程': 8 }

order.description: 在志愿表里的顺序（1 起，跨冲/稳/保连续编号）

admission_year.description: 默认取数据库中最新年份

enable_llm_tuning.description: 可选: 是否调用大模型做最终调优

excluded_majors.description: 主观排除的专业关键词

gender.description: 体检/性别/语种 等一刀切硬门槛

health.description: 已确诊不可报考的限制

math_score.description: 单科成绩 (硬门槛 + 能力匹配)

plan_size.description:
输出规模。HLJ 新高考一次 40 个院校专业组，所以 default=40；上限放宽到 500
允许"批量分析"使用方式，常规用户不必关心。

preferred_majors.description: CHSI 标准专业 / 大类 / 关键词

priority_strategy.description: 学校 vs 专业 优先策略

provincial_rank.description: 省内位次（来自一分一段）

selected_subjects.description: 选科列表，例如 ["物理","化学","生物"]

items.description: 全部 ≤ planSize 条，按冲→稳→保顺序排列

strategy_reason.description: 解释为什么走这个路线

volunteer_plan.description: 草稿载体，给 toolExecutor 用
